ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the problem */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of the problem */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the problem */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the problem statement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the problem */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the problem has been viewed */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the problem has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the problem has received */,
  "upvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the problem has received */,
  "downvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the problem has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., String, Array, Dynamic Programming) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tag has been viewed */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tag has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the tag has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or short description */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* User's reputation score based on contributions and interactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the submission belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the submission (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was last updated */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the submitted solution */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the submitted solution */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "code_length" INTEGER /* Length of the submitted code in characters */,
  "upvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the submission has received */,
  "downvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the submission has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the topic has been viewed */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the topic has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the topic has received */,
  "upvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the topic has received */,
  "downvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the topic has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_topics_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been viewed */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the post has received */,
  "upvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the post has received */,
  "downvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the post has received */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last edited the post */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES forum_topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been viewed */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "upvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes_count" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last edited the comment */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES forum_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being ranked */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of the user */,
  "num_submissions" INTEGER /* Number of submissions made by the user */,
  "problem_solving_speed" REAL /* Problem-solving speed of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the user */,
  "level" TEXT /* User's level based on points */,
  "badges_count" INTEGER /* Number of badges earned by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
